title: Broccoli, Chilli and Lemon Pasta
summary: This pasta is made with ‘twice-cooked’ broccoli (ripassate in Italian) it’s quickly boiled and then fried with olive oil, garlic and chilli for a simple dinner.

method.description: Bring a large pan of well salted water to the boil. Roughly chop the entire head of broccoli and add to the water.
Cook for about 5 mins until soft. Meanwhile, add a splash of olive oil to a large pan over a medium heat. Finely chop the garlic, add and cook for 3 mins until just starting to turn gold.
Add the chilli and then scoop out the broccoli and add along with half a mug of the cooking water.
Break up the broccoli with a spoon and let it simmer gently while you cook the pasta in the same pan you cooked the broccoli in.

Once the pasta is al dente, add to the pan with the broccoli along with some more cooking water, toss well, season with salt and lemon juice to taste. Then plate up and serve with an extra sprinkle of chilli.

chefs.name: Jordon Ezra King
chefs.summary: Jordon Ezra King is a chef and storyteller. Having cooked, temped, and staged his way through a host of kitchens around the world, Jordon has now set his sights on sharing his knowledge with the world, using his platform to teach people how to work their way around a kitchen and educate them about the provenance of the dishes they're cooking while he does it.
